name: gptpro-gh-workbench
description: Session-protected Cloudflare Worker portal and narrow GitHub broker for the GPTPro GitHub Workbench.

scripts.check: node --check src/worker.js && node --check scripts/create-action-passcode.mjs && node --check tests/worker.test.js && node --check tests/workbench_docs.test.js && node --check tests/create_action_passcode_cli.test.js && python3 -m py_compile docs/ks2_workbench_broker_probe.py tests/broker_probe_test.py
